diagrams.title: Singly Linked List Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the basic structure of a singly linked list with nodes containing data and next pointers
diagrams.purpose: Understand node structure and how nodes are connected

diagrams.title: Node Insertion at Beginning
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of inserting a new node at the beginning of linked list
elements: Step 1: New node next points to first node
Step 2: Head pointer updated to new node

diagrams.title: Node Deletion at Beginning
diagrams.description: Process of deleting the first node from a linked list
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory management and pointer updates during deletion

diagrams.title: Doubly Linked List
diagrams.description: Shows bidirectional pointers in a doubly linked list
elements: Node with prev, data, and next fields
NULL at both ends (first node prev and last node next)

diagrams.title: Circular Linked List
diagrams.description: Shows last node pointing back to first node forming a circle
elements: Single circular and double circular variants
diagrams.purpose: Understand circular nature and its advantages
